name: PC-LINK MANAGER 3
description: Back up model data and update firmware on the Sanwa M12S transmitter over USB.
notes: M12S only - the M12 and EXZES Z use PC-LINK MANAGER 2. The zip ships both a portable LinkManager3.exe and a LinkManager3_setup.exe; RC Central runs the portable one, so no admin is needed for the app itself. Installing the bundled SANWA-M12.inf USB driver does need admin and must be done by hand. Requires .NET Framework 4. This is the only Sanwa PC software that exists - the rest of their line has none, and transmitter firmware ships as microSD payloads on one-off news pages. Sanwa's own link is http://; the https form serves the same file and is used here. Deliberately has NO version_check: the URL and page carry no version number, which also makes this the most rot-resistant download in the catalog - but it means a silent in-place update would go unnoticed.
